name: The Jeff Foxworthy Show
overview: Jeff Foxworthy is a hardworking husband and father. Between paying his mortgage, running his heating and air company business and raising his precocious son, he learns what every self-respecting redneck knows: tractor pulls come and go, but family is forever!

trailers.title: Tuesdays - THE JEFF FOXWORTHY SHOW + THE BILL ENGVALL SHOW
